name: Beer-Boiled Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the Budweiser into a large pot.
2. Add onion, garlic, bay leaf, peppercorns, celery, and salt to the beer in the pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add lemon quarters and shrimp to the pot.
6. Simmer for an additional 12 minutes.
7. Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
8. Drain any excess liquid, if needed.
9. Peel off the shells of the shrimp.
10. Chill the shrimp well before serving.
